seo.title: Milan Mendpara - Mobile App Developer Portfolio
seo.description: Portfolio of Milan Mendpara - IT Business Owner and Mobile App Developer specialized in iOS and Android.
seo.keywords: mobile developer, flutter, ios, android, portfolio, ahmedabad, dealerclick, steeplemate
seo.author: Milan Mendpara

header.tagline: Mobile App Developer and IT Business Owner.

paragraphs: I am a seasoned Mobile App Developer and IT professional with over 10 years of experience building and scaling high-performance iOS and Android applications. Based in Ahmedabad, India, I run my own IT business focusing on end-to-end product delivery.

Over the past decade, I have successfully developed and launched more than 50 mobile applications, ranging from complex Dealership Management Systems to community-driven religious platforms. My focus is on writing clean, scalable code while maintaining a high-end tech aesthetic for every project.

items.name: SteepleMate
description: A comprehensive church and religious community management platform.

items.name: NumbersBee
description: Interactive educational app with live-streaming matches and practice modules.

items.name: DealerClick DMS
description: Enterprise Dealership Management System for automotive inventory and lead tracking.

responsibilities: Built and managed a portfolio of 50+ mobile applications across diverse industries.
Leading technical architecture for cross-platform apps using Flutter and React Native.
Overseeing full-cycle development from requirement analysis to App Store and Play Store deployment.
Specializing in high-end photo restoration and technical image refining for UI/UX assets.

footer.built_with_text: Built with ❤️ and 10+ years of Mobile Expertise
footer.tagline: Let's connect and turn your next big idea into a high-performance app!
